run_summary: Issue-proposal processing run. Processed 4 analyst resolution proposals (ISS-1486, ISS-1487, ISS-1488, ISS-1489, ISS-1490). Three expansion patches self-applied (EXP-240 WIN-069, EXP-241 WIN-068, EXP-242 predictions.json); one expansion was no-op (EXP-239, ISS-1486 already resolved). All 3448 tests pass.

expansions_integrated.description: ISS-1486 (WIN-025 architectural disjoint, c4 H5 moderate) confirmed already resolved by EXP-235. Substring checks verified: scaling equation, FSF=H(r)/r, Pearson r≈0.9999, and 2017 Boulder anchor all present in current detail_evidence. c4 was reading pre-EXP-235 text. Closed without any text patch.

WIN-069 detail_evidence: replaced unsupported 'sub-1% mean-ratio prediction errors ... with a single free parameter' quantifier with citation-faithful language. Correctly characterizes Giacomin & Levinson 2015 (descriptive circuity, ~1.19 mean across 51 US MSAs) and Huber & Rust 2016 (OSRM Stata tooling paper). Added DOI links. Explicitly retracts the overreached quantifiers. Reframes surviving comparison on parity grounds: V13's 10.2% is itself in-sample, so comparison holds on both sides. delta +1092 chars. Tests pass.

WIN-068: two scope-compression patches. PATCH-A (detail_verdict_text P2): compressed 755-char explanation of 2026-eclipse-formula FSF to single cross-reference sentence pointing to WIN-010/WIN-025 where FSF actually enters the predicted signal. delta -236 chars. PATCH-B (detail_evidence ¶3): same compression for parallel passage. delta -70 chars. Retraction signal preserved at both sites. FSF-spectator framing for 39-eclipse ensemble retained. Tests pass.

PRED-SR-SUPPRESS and PRED-093: flipped data_predates_registration false->true and is_genuinely_prospective true->false. Appended dated reclassification audit-trail notes to each entry (prior 2026-04-10 decider text retained verbatim above). Rationale: G3 geomagnetic storm (Kp=7, NOAA confirmed) occurred 2026-03-20/22; PRED-SR-SUPPRESS registered 1-3 days later (Mar 23); PRED-093 registered 13 days later (Apr 4). Near-real-time SR data was available before registration. genuinelyProspective count in build: 11 (was 13). Tests pass.
